h0cdbff72g8f17g44dagb398g6687f5aad5eb: We're not in the clear yet. Keep sharp until we're standing on cobbles in Baldur's Gate.
hf2846c4egc472g4efdgbfa8g69f8cbd97154: What's this? Mattis, this is junk! Waste of effort hauling it with us.
hc00ed2f3g3a46g4e59g8057g538182611990: No, there's collectors in the city! They'll pay good coin for it, I swear!
h2cabed2cg6f53g482ag84e1g4a053386e120: Fine, but you're carrying it yourself.
h5ca150f8gec12g400ag9bb7gb44c92c59eb0: Right, all of our takings stashed away for the journey?
hdc2648f9geae8g42f4g8f45g7ce90217a9c0: Better be sure. We need every last copper piece to get started in Baldur's Gate.
